subcodes.title: Words to Mountfort Mills, spoken on 1909-05-26
subcodes.first_line: There may be speaking from a text taken from the writings, but it should be written out by the speakers... You must be careful not to have anyone harmed by speaking. Suppose some speak not well.
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @consultation, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
